chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-25 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For orders on CMA No.270/2025. 2. For hearing of CMA No.271/2025. 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 03.06.2025 Mr. Aijaz Hussain Shirazi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Mohsin Qadir Shahwani, Additional Attorney General. Mr. Nabil Kolachi, advocate for respondents No.5, 6 and 7. Mr. Abdul Aleem, Deputy Director, FIA. Mr. Nand Lal, Assistant Director, FIA, new I.O. Mr. Bilal Ahmed, SHO/SI, FIA CBC, Karachi (previous I.O. SIP Muhammad Nasir, P.S Preedy South Karachi..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Bilal Ahmed, previous Investigating Officer has given a reply to show cause notice. Mr. Abdul Aleem, Deputy Director, FIA CBC Karachi has also given a reply to the show cause notice. These replies are not found satisfactory, however, in the interest of justice the show cause notices are vacated. The Director, FIA, Karachi, notwithstanding the reply to show cause notice, shall take disciplinary action against the previous Investigating Officer in accordance with law for his failure to attend the Court. He shall hear the parties and thereafter pass an order in accordance with law. The interim order is vacated. The I.O is directed to complete the inquiry strictly in accordance with law. The petitioner and other persons present in Court shall join the inquiry with full cooperation. I.O shall ensure that the inquiry is completed within two months. However, it is made clear that the enquiry shall be carried out fairly and impartially and no undue harassment shall be caused to any person. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms.

However, it is made clear that the enquiry shall be carried out fairly and impartially and no undue harassment shall be caused to any person. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Ayaz Gul
